mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_board (board_id, board_name, description, created_by, modified_by) VALUES (#{req.boardId}, #{req.boardName}, #{req.description}, #{req.createdBy}, #{req.createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_board SET board_name = #{req.boardName}, description = #{req.description}, modified_by = #{req.modifiedBy}, modified_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE board_id = #{req.boardId}
UPDATE tb_board SET use_yn = NOT use_yn, modified_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
